name: plan050-position-priority-fit-workflow
description: Connect collected postings to posting/fit/gap analysis, action-stage priority recommendations, user-confirmed priority, preparation actions, and dashboard display.
recommended_defaults: Use action stages instead of absolute company ranking.
Keep LLM recommendationSnapshot separate from userConfirmedPriority.
Reuse candidate profile, application-agent files, previous recommendation reports, manual active-open URLs, and study/interview workflows before adding new generators.
Show prepare-now/investigate/monitor/low-priority/hold/excluded as badges; map to user-facing 1/2/3/4 only for compact views.

phases.title: Recommendation snapshot from postings and existing assets
